The entire service was magnificent! Thank you!

reviews.comment:
Muy buenos todos los servicios. Hasta el baño tiene un punto a destacar.
Particularmente, dentro del servicompras, un tal Agustín me asoció al ACA (buenas promociones) y me atendió de maravilla.
Solo algo a mejorar… dentro del establecimiento venden cosas criollas como quesos y chorizos, lo cual en la teoría parece buena idea, pero la verdad es que deja un olor a pata terrible.

(Translated by Google)
All the services were excellent. Even the restroom was noteworthy.
In particular, inside the convenience store, a guy named Agustín signed me up for the ACA (great promotions) and gave me fantastic service. Just one thing to improve… they sell traditional Argentine items like cheeses and sausages inside the store, which seems like a good idea in theory, but it actually leaves a terrible foot odor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OV05uaHFNakZTV0dwTWJrcHhSRXhaTmxWSmNWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estaba volviendo de la costa un poco triste ya que volvía a la rutina, pero esta parada me dio energía y Agustin (en el servicompras) me transmitió lindas emociones para seguir adelante.
Muchas gracias, volveré a ir!
Pd: ojalá volver y que me atienda Agustín.

(Translated by Google)
I was coming back from the coast feeling a little down because I was going back to my routine, but this stop gave me energy, and Agustin (at the convenience store) gave me such positive vibes to keep going.

Thank you so much, I'll be back!
P.S.: I hope to return and have Agustin help me again.

reviews.comment:
Una parada espectacular ya sea por sus dos opciones, restaurant con variedad de platos y comidas, y por su servicompras en dónde pueden comprar golosinas,snacks al paso,bebidas. Baños muy limpios. Personal muy agradable. En ambos lugares pueden comprar productos regionales, además se por supuesto cargar tu tanque de nafta. También cuenta con estacionamiento y una gran arboleda para descansar de la ruta

(Translated by Google)
A spectacular stop, offering two options: a restaurant with a variety of dishes and meals, and a convenience store where you can buy sweets, snacks, and drinks. The restrooms are very clean, and the staff is very friendly. At both locations, you can purchase regional products, and of course, fill up your gas tank. There's also parking and a large grove of trees where you can rest after a long drive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21kWVkwVlFOM015VVZac1pUWjROelpRVFhaSWJXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Le doy 1 estrella solo por la experiencoa de anoche 17/2/2026  a las 22.40 regresando de la costa (Carnaval) Mucho tiempo de espera ya que habia solo in playero (Para este colaborador le doy 6 estrellas!! Excelente trato a pesar de la saturaciin de trabajo) que solo podria atender 2 de las 4 islas de carga de combustible. Confio que para porximas fechas con alta demanda de servicios asignaran los recursos adecuados para atencion al publico

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving it 1 star only because of my experience last night, February 17, 2026, at 10:40 PM, returning from the coast (Carnival). There was a very long wait because there was only one attendant (I give this employee 6 stars!! Excellent service despite being very busy) who could only attend to 2 of the 4 fuel pumps. I trust that for upcoming dates with high demand for services, they will allocate the appropriate resources for customer service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oSFdWcHVkblZyUWxRMGVsbFpMWGROUkcxWVFsRRAB
